records.question: What tracks named My Mistake from the album Judas 0: B-Sides and Rarities have a unit price of 0.99, are MPEG audio files, and were purchased in quantity 1 with invoiceline unit price at most 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
WHERE album.title = 'Judas 0: B-Sides and Rarities' AND mediatype.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND track.unitprice = 0.99 AND invoiceline.unitprice <= 0.99 AND invoiceline.quantity = 1 AND track.name = 'My Mistake'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT track.TrackId 
FROM Track track 
JOIN Album album ON track.AlbumId = album.AlbumId 
JOIN InvoiceLine invoiceLine ON track.TrackId = invoiceLine.TrackId 
JOIN MediaType mediaType ON track.MediaTypeId = mediaType.MediaTypeId 
WHERE track.Name = 'My Mistake' 
AND album.Title = 'Judas 0: B-Sides and Rarities' 
AND track.UnitPrice = 0.99 
AND mediaType.Name = 'MPEG audio' 
AND invoiceLine.Quantity = 1 
AND invoiceLine.UnitPrice <= 0.99
